title: Home
left_blurbs: Welcome to my personal corner of the web...
...a place for me to document the things that I do for nobody
right_content: Welcome to my homepage. Have a look around — I hope you find something interesting or of value to you here.
Take a look at my projects. I'm always building something new, so check back often to see what I've been working on.
If you're interested in what I've been thinking about lately, head over to the blog. I write about whatever is on my mind.
I'm also a photographer. You can browse my collection on the photos page. New photos are added randomly.
Learn more about what this site is all about.
